name: Great Plains Propane Service, Inc.
notes: Single-location operator, family-owned since 1955. Serves Saunders, Sarpy, Cass, Lancaster, Douglas, Washington, Dodge, Pottawattamie, and Otoe counties. Company DOES have a website (gpspropane.com / greatplainspropane.com) despite being in the no-website batch.

name: Appalachian Propane & Supply
notes: Single-location small operator in Summersville, WV.

name: Buckeye Propane Co., Inc.
notes: MAJOR UPDATE: Not a single-location operator - Buckeye Propane & Soft Water has 6 locations across southern/southwest Ohio. Independently owned since 1957. Company DOES have a website (buckeyepropane.com) despite being in the no-website batch.

name: SPENCER MOUNTAIN PROPANE
notes: Single-location small operator. May be affiliated with/acquired by United Propane Gas (upgas.com).

name: B & L Propane Co., Inc.
notes: Single-location, family-owned since 1961. Serves Hurricane and surrounding southern Utah.

name: Almighty Propane LLC
notes: Single-location small operator in Rio Grande Valley. Company DOES have a website (almightypropane.com) despite being in the no-website batch.

name: Fulfer Propane, Inc
notes: Single-location family-owned operator since 1974. Serves Erath, Palo Pinto, Eastland, Hood, Comanche, Parker, and Somervell counties (north-central TX, not West TX as originally noted). Company DOES have a website (fulferpropane.com).

name: Wolf River Propane
notes: Single-location operator serving east central Wisconsin. Company DOES have a website (wolfriverpropane.com).

name: New Flame Propane
notes: Small operator in Clark County, WA. Two addresses identified: Vancouver retail/fill station and Battle Ground registered business address. Company DOES have a website (newflamepropane.com).

name: Barker's propane
notes: Single-location small operator in Logan, UT.

name: Seven is Enough
notes: Single-location small operator in Damascus, VA (far southwest VA). Phone number not found in public listings. Possibly affiliated with Glade Spring Co. Propane.

name: Luke's Propane
notes: STATE MISLABEL: Primary operations are in Molalla, OR (not WA). A Luke's Propane LLC entity is registered in Brush Prairie, WA (Clark County, near Portland OR metro area) but no operating address/phone was found for it. Likely a single-region operator serving the Portland/SW WA border area from the Oregon HQ. Company DOES have a website (lukespropane.com).

name: Northwoods LP
notes: Single-location small operator in Laona, WI (northern WI). NOTE: A separate 'Northwoods Propane' exists in Rice Lake, WI (2477 16th St, 54868, 715-236-7718) - likely a different company. Northwoods LP DOES have a website (northwoodslp.com).

name: Asapropane
notes: STATE MISLABEL: Located in Queenstown, MD (not DE). On Delmarva peninsula (Eastern Shore of Maryland). Single-location veteran-owned operator. Company DOES have a website (asapropane.com).

name: LP Plus
notes: Single-location drive-thru propane refill station, cylinder sales, service, and autogas in Green Bay, WI. Phone not found in public listings. Company DOES have a website (lpplususa.com).
